text:
(a) An individual who violates Section 680.002 (Sale of Motorcycle Without Serial Numbers) commits an offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:

(1) a fine not to exceed $200;

(2) confinement in county jail for a term not to exceed 30 days; or

(3) both the fine and confinement.

(c) Each sale of a motorcycle in violation of this subchapter is a separate offense.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.003 — Offense; Penalty

(a) An individual who violates Section 680.002 (Sale of Motorcycle Without Serial Numbers) commits an offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:

    (1) a fine not to exceed $200;

    (2) confinement in county jail for a term not to exceed 30 days; or

    (3) both the fine and confinement.

(c) Each sale of a motorcycle in violation of this subchapter is a separate offense.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
